quotas.defaultDescription: This workspace uses the platform default quota plan.
quotas.overridden: An administrator has applied workspace overrides
quotas.hard: New usage is blocked at the limit
quotas.soft: Overage warns without interrupting public access
quotas.historyHint: Daily usage over the last 30 days
quotas.historyEmpty: Trend data will appear after automatic daily collection

notice.title: Usage has reached 70%
notice.owner: Review recent growth and consider additional capacity before it becomes urgent.

warning.title: Quota is running low
warning.owner: Upgrade the plan or purchase more capacity to avoid interrupted work.

critical.title: Quota has been exhausted
critical.owner: Upgrade now to restore capacity for new activity.

prompts.member: Contact the workspace owner to request more capacity.

quotas.note: Storage, resources, members, shares, AI, and exports only block new usage at the limit. Existing content remains available to view, download, or delete. Public views and download traffic are currently warning-only.

toast.aiSubmitted: The AI optimization task was submitted. Track it in the task center.
